instructions: These are the default settings for the cockpit. To claim this ship, you must complete the following steps: 1-SSH to the IP address of this ship and log in with the default credentials above. 2-Create a user with a home folder and assign the user to the group 'pilot'. 3-In the home folder, create pilot.json: {"pilotName":"value","shipName":"value","pilotImage":"value"}. pilotImage can be any URL or local path that a browser can load.
